steps.title: Focus on the publication year
steps.content: The student's goal is to identify when The Canon of Medicine was published. The relevant note states that it was published in 1025 CE.

steps.title: Reject off-goal details
steps.content: Choice A describes the book's content, Choice B identifies Ibn Sina's background, and Choice C describes the book's later use. None of those choices identifies the publication year. The remaining option uses the needed year. The answer is D.
